items.title: Penalized loss structure
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  dataLoss["L_data: fit labels"] --> total["L_total = L_data + lambda * Omega"]
  penalty["Omega: L1 or L2 on weights"] --> total
  total --> optimize["optimizer updates weights"]
items.caption: Regularization adds a weight penalty Ω to the data loss; λ scales how strongly complexity is discouraged.

items.title: L2 shrinkage vs L1 sparsity
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  l2["L2: round constraint"] --> shrink["all weights smaller, rarely zero"]
  l1["L1: diamond constraint"] --> sparse["some weights exactly zero"]
items.caption: L2 spreads shrinkage across weights; L1's axis-aligned corners encourage exact zeros.

items.title: Lambda and the bias-variance tradeoff
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  lowL["small lambda"] --> highVar["higher variance risk"]
  highL["large lambda"] --> highBias["higher bias / underfit"]
  midL["tuned lambda on validation"] --> sweet["lower validation error"]
items.caption: Increasing λ reduces overfitting sensitivity but can underfit if set too high—validate to find the middle ground.
